component.name: OLE DB Destination

property.description: The number of seconds before a command times out. A value of 0 indicates an infinite time-out.
property.name: CommandTimeout

property.description: Specifies the name of the database object used to open a rowset.
property.name: OpenRowset

property.description: Specifies the variable that contains the name of the database object used to open a rowset.
property.name: OpenRowsetVariable

property.description: The SQL command to be executed.
property.name: SqlCommand

property.description: Specifies the column code page to use when code page information is unavailable from the data source.
property.name: DefaultCodePage

property.description: Forces the use of the DefaultCodePage property value when describing character data.
property.name: AlwaysUseDefaultCodePage

property.description: Specifies the mode used to access the database.
property.name: AccessMode

property.description: Indicates whether the values supplied for identity columns will be copied to the destination. If false, values for identity columns will be auto-generated at the destination. Applies only if fast load is turned on.
property.name: FastLoadKeepIdentity

property.description: Indicates whether the columns containing null will have null inserted in the destination. If false, columns containing null will have their default values inserted at the destination. Applies only if fast load is turned on.
property.name: FastLoadKeepNulls

property.description: Specifies options to be used with fast load. Applies only if fast load is turned on.
property.name: FastLoadOptions

property.description: Specifies when commits are issued during data insertion. A value of 0 specifies that one commit will be issued at the end of data insertion. Applies only if fast load is turned on.
property.name: FastLoadMaxInsertCommitSize

connection.description: The OLE DB runtime connection used to access the database.
connection.name: OleDbConnection

component.description: Microsoft Oracle Source Component by Attunity
component.name: Oracle Source

property.description: The name of the table to be fetched.
property.name: TableName

property.description: The SQL command to be executed.
property.name: SqlCommand

properties.property: SELECT CUST_ODS_ID ,CUST_KEY_ID ,CUST_CLASS_TYP ,CUST_NAME ,CUST_NBR ,ULTIMATE_CUST_ODS_ID ,ULTIMATE_CUST_NBR ,ULTIMATE_CUST_NAME ,PARENT_CUST_ODS_ID ,PARENT_CUST_NBR ,PARENT_CUST_NAME ,CUST_STATUS_CD ,CUST_PHONE_NBR ,CUST_CONTACT_NAME ,CUST_CONTACT_EMAIL_ADDR ,CUST_SINCE_DT ,AGENT_ODS_ID ,AGENT_TYP ,RESELLER_IND ,RESELLER_CATGRY_TYP ,PARTNER_IND ,PRIM_SALES_EMP_ODS_ID ,PRIM_SALES_EMP_NBR ,INTERNAL_COMPANY_IND ,DUNS_NBR ,NAICS_CD ,SOURCE_CREATE_DT ,SOURCE_LAST_MODIFY_DT ,SOURCE_LAST_MODIFY_USER_ID ,DW_CREATE_DT ,DW_LAST_MODIFY_DT ,DW_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD ,CUST_WEBSITE_ADDR ,CUST_LINE1_ADDR ,CUST_CITY_NAME ,CUST_STATE_CD ,CUST_POSTAL_CD ,CUST_COUNTRY_NAME ,CUST_GL_SEG2_PROFIT_CTR_ODS_ID ,CUST_GL_PROFIT_CTR_CD ,CUST_ID ,CUST_BLDG_ADDR ,CUST_FLOOR_ADDR ,CUST_SUITE_ADDR ,CUST_OTHER_ADDR ,ADDR_VALIDATION_STATUS_DESC ,SALES_REP_ODS_ID ,SALES_REP_ID ,DW_SECURE_CUI_IND ,CUST_SYSTEM_ID ,DW_SECURE_COMPANY_NBR ,DW_DIVEST_EFFECT_DT ,CUST_SUCCESS_EMP_ODS_ID ,CUST_SUCCESS_POSITION_ID FROM CODS.CUSTOMER WHERE 1=1 AND DW_LAST_MODIFY_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)

property.description: The number of rows fetched in a batch.
property.name: BatchSize

property.description: Number of pre-fetched rows.
property.name: PrefetchCount

component.contactInfo: OLE DB Destination;Microsoft Corporation; Microsoft SQL Server; (C) Microsoft Corporation; All Rights Reserved; http://www.microsoft.com/sql/support;4
component.name: OLE DB Destination

property.description: The number of seconds before a command times out. A value of 0 indicates an infinite time-out.
property.name: CommandTimeout

property.description: Specifies the name of the database object used to open a rowset.
property.name: OpenRowset

property.description: Specifies the variable that contains the name of the database object used to open a rowset.
property.name: OpenRowsetVariable

property.description: The SQL command to be executed.
property.name: SqlCommand

property.description: Specifies the column code page to use when code page information is unavailable from the data source.
property.name: DefaultCodePage

property.description: Forces the use of the DefaultCodePage property value when describing character data.
property.name: AlwaysUseDefaultCodePage

property.description: Specifies the mode used to access the database.
property.name: AccessMode

property.description: Indicates whether the values supplied for identity columns will be copied to the destination. If false, values for identity columns will be auto-generated at the destination. Applies only if fast load is turned on.
property.name: FastLoadKeepIdentity

property.description: Indicates whether the columns containing null will have null inserted in the destination. If false, columns containing null will have their default values inserted at the destination. Applies only if fast load is turned on.
property.name: FastLoadKeepNulls

property.description: Specifies options to be used with fast load. Applies only if fast load is turned on.
property.name: FastLoadOptions

property.description: Specifies when commits are issued during data insertion. A value of 0 specifies that one commit will be issued at the end of data insertion. Applies only if fast load is turned on.
property.name: FastLoadMaxInsertCommitSize

connection.description: The OLE DB runtime connection used to access the database.
connection.name: OleDbConnection

properties.property: select employee_ods_id, emp_department_name, emp_first_name, emp_last_name, emp_job_title_name, emp_email_addr, sales_emp_role_ods_id, emp_job_family_name from cods.employee where 1=1 and emp_job_function_name = 'SALES' and emp_status_cd = 'Active' and dw_last_modify_dt >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)

component.contactInfo: OLE DB Destination;Microsoft Corporation; Microsoft SQL Server; (C) Microsoft Corporation; All Rights Reserved; http://www.microsoft.com/sql/support;4
component.name: OLE DB Destination

property.description: The number of seconds before a command times out. A value of 0 indicates an infinite time-out.
property.name: CommandTimeout

property.description: Specifies the name of the database object used to open a rowset.
property.name: OpenRowset

property.description: Specifies the variable that contains the name of the database object used to open a rowset.
property.name: OpenRowsetVariable

property.description: The SQL command to be executed.
property.name: SqlCommand

property.description: Specifies the column code page to use when code page information is unavailable from the data source.
property.name: DefaultCodePage

property.description: Forces the use of the DefaultCodePage property value when describing character data.
property.name: AlwaysUseDefaultCodePage

property.description: Specifies the mode used to access the database.
property.name: AccessMode

property.description: Indicates whether the values supplied for identity columns will be copied to the destination. If false, values for identity columns will be auto-generated at the destination. Applies only if fast load is turned on.
property.name: FastLoadKeepIdentity

property.description: Indicates whether the columns containing null will have null inserted in the destination. If false, columns containing null will have their default values inserted at the destination. Applies only if fast load is turned on.
property.name: FastLoadKeepNulls

property.description: Specifies options to be used with fast load. Applies only if fast load is turned on.
property.name: FastLoadOptions

property.description: Specifies when commits are issued during data insertion. A value of 0 specifies that one commit will be issued at the end of data insertion. Applies only if fast load is turned on.
property.name: FastLoadMaxInsertCommitSize

connection.description: The OLE DB runtime connection used to access the database.
connection.name: OleDbConnection

property.description: The name of the table to be fetched.
property.name: TableName

property.name: SqlCommand

properties.property: SELECT BILL_ACCOUNT_ODS_ID ,BILL_ACCOUNT_KEY_ID ,BILL_ACCOUNT_SYSTEM_ID ,BILL_ACCOUNT_NBR ,BILL_ACCOUNT_NAME ,PARENT_BILL_ACCOUNT_ODS_ID ,PARENT_BILL_ACCOUNT_NBR ,FINANCE_ACCOUNT_NBR ,CUST_ODS_ID ,CUST_NBR ,BILL_CYCLE_CD ,BILL_ACCOUNT_STATUS_CD ,DW_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD ,BILL_ACCT_ALT_SYS_ID ,dw_last_modify_dt FROM CODS.BILLING_ACCOUNT WHERE 1=1 --AND dw_secure_cui_ind = 'N' AND dw_last_modify_dt >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)--'10-JUN-25' AND (BILL_ACCT_CUST_TYP NOT IN ('Residential', 'RESIDENTIAL', 'Consumer Residential') or BILL_ACCT_CUST_TYP IS NULL)

property.description: The number of rows fetched in a batch.
property.name: BatchSize

property.description: Number of pre-fetched rows.
property.name: PrefetchCount

property.description: Determines the chunk size allocation for LOB columns
property.name: LobChunkSize

property.description: The code page to use when code page information is unavailable from the data source.
property.name: DefaultCodePage

property.description: The mode used to access the database.
property.name: AccessMode
